title: sqlite3_overload_function ignores errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND created_at > TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = 1;
